{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "",
  "description": "Elkris Foods Nigeria Limited is an innovative Food Manufacturing company in Nigeria, specifically devoted to developing and producing healthier alternatives to garri, pounded yam, fufu etc; using a double-fibre natural swallow product known to contain scientifically-proven diabetes and cholesterol regulatory ingredients.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.)&nbsp;Product Dispatch and Logistics Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The product dispatch &amp; logistics officer will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and overseeing the efficient dispatch, transportation, and delivery of products to customers, distributors, stockists, and company outlets.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong logistics management skills, attention to detail, and the ability to ensure timely and accurate deliveries while maintaining inventory integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate the daily dispatch of products to customers, stockists, distributors, and branches.
	Plan and optimize delivery routes to ensure timely and cost-effective distribution.
	Monitor inventory movement and maintain accurate dispatch records.
	Ensure all dispatched products correspond with approved invoices, waybills, and delivery notes.
	Supervise warehouse loading and unloading activities.
	Liaise with warehouse personnel, sales teams, transport providers, and customers to ensure smooth operations.
	Track deliveries and promptly resolve logistics or dispatch-related issues.
	Monitor vehicle utilization, delivery schedules, and logistics performance.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly logistics and dispatch reports for management.
	Investigate and report product shortages, damages, or delivery discrepancies.
	Maintain proper documentation for all logistics transactions.
	Recommend process improvements to enhance operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Transport Management, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in product dispatch, warehouse operations, logistics, or supply chain management, preferably within an FMCG company.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management and distribution processes.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Microsoft Excel.
	Experience using inventory or warehouse management systems is an added advantage.
	Excellent organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet strict delivery timelines.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and attention to detail.


Preferred Competencies:


	Logistics planning and coordination.
	Warehouse and inventory management.
	Dispatch documentation and record-keeping.
	Vendor and transporter relationship management.
	Time management and multitasking.
	Data analysis and reporting.
	Customer service orientation.
	Leadership and teamwork.


Remuneration


	N250,000 monthly
	Competitive salary
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	A dynamic and performance.


Application Closing Date:&nbsp;29th July, 2026.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send thier CV to: recruitment@elkrisgroup.org using &quot;Product Dispatch &amp; Logistics Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.

&nbsp;

2.)&nbsp;Driver

Job Location: Akowonjo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday to Friday

Job Summary


	Elkris Bio Health Foods is urgently seeking a responsible, experienced, and safety-conscious Driver to join our growing team in Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for the timely and safe delivery of company products while maintaining high standards of professionalism and customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely operate the company&#39;s delivery van for product distribution.
	Ensure prompt and accurate delivery of products to customers and company locations.
	Inspect the vehicle before and after each trip and report any faults or maintenance needs.
	Maintain accurate delivery records and obtain proof of delivery where necessary.
	Ensure products are handled carefully to prevent damage during transit.
	Adhere to all traffic laws, company policies, and safety regulations.
	Assist with loading and unloading products when required.
	Keep the delivery vehicle clean and in good working condition.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND in any discipline.
	Valid Nigerian Driver&#39;s Licence with a clean driving record.
	Proven experience as a delivery van driver or in a similar driving role.
	Good knowledge of Lagos road network and traffic regulations.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.
	Honest, reliable, and physically fit.


Salary
N90,000 - N100,000 per month.&nbsp;

Application Closing Date:&nbsp;23rd July, 2026.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@elkrisgroup.org using &quot;Driver &ndash; Lagos&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Application is urgent. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

&nbsp;

3.)&nbsp;Delivery Van Driver

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Monday &ndash; Friday)

Key Responsibilities


	Safely transport and deliver company products to customers.
	Ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Maintain the cleanliness and basic maintenance of the assigned vehicle.
	Keep accurate delivery records and obtain proof of delivery.
	Comply with all traffic laws and company safety policies.


Minimum Qualification


	HND in any discipline.


Requirements:


	Valid driver&#39;s licence.
	Proven experience as a delivery van driver.
	Good knowledge of Lagos road network and traffic regulations.
	Ability to drive safely and deliver products promptly.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Honest, responsible, and physically fit.


Salary
N90,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date:&nbsp;23rd July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@elkrisgroup.org using &quot;Delivery Van Driver &ndash; Lagos&quot; as the subject of the email.

Job Opening at Elkris Foods Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Elkris Foods Nigeria Limited is an innovative Food Manufacturing company in Nigeria, specifically devoted to developing and producing healthier alternatives to garri, pounded yam, fufu etc; using a double-fibre natural swallow product known to contain scientifically-proven diabetes and cholesterol regulatory ingredients.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Product Dispatch and Logistics Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The product dispatch & logistics officer will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and overseeing the efficient dispatch, transportation, and delivery of products to customers, distributors, stockists, and company outlets.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong logistics management skills, attention to detail, and the ability to ensure timely and accurate deliveries while maintaining inventory integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate the daily dispatch of products to customers, stockists, distributors, and branches.
	Plan and optimize delivery routes to ensure timely and cost-effective distribution.
	Monitor inventory movement and maintain accurate dispatch records.
	Ensure all dispatched products correspond with approved invoices, waybills, and delivery notes.
	Supervise warehouse loading and unloading activities.
	Liaise with warehouse personnel, sales teams, transport providers, and customers to ensure smooth operations.
	Track deliveries and promptly resolve logistics or dispatch-related issues.
	Monitor vehicle utilization, delivery schedules, and logistics performance.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly logistics and dispatch reports for management.
	Investigate and report product shortages, damages, or delivery discrepancies.
	Maintain proper documentation for all logistics transactions.
	Recommend process improvements to enhance operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Transport Management, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in product dispatch, warehouse operations, logistics, or supply chain management, preferably within an FMCG company.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management and distribution processes.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Microsoft Excel.
	Experience using inventory or warehouse management systems is an added advantage.
	Excellent organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet strict delivery timelines.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and attention to detail.


Preferred Competencies:


	Logistics planning and coordination.
	Warehouse and inventory management.
	Dispatch documentation and record-keeping.
	Vendor and transporter relationship management.
	Time management and multitasking.
	Data analysis and reporting.
	Customer service orientation.
	Leadership and teamwork.


Remuneration


	N250,000 monthly
	Competitive salary
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	A dynamic and performance.


Application Closing Date: 29th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send thier CV to: [email protected] using "Product Dispatch & Logistics Officer" as the subject of the mail.

 

2.) Driver

Job Location: Akowonjo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday to Friday

Job Summary


	Elkris Bio Health Foods is urgently seeking a responsible, experienced, and safety-conscious Driver to join our growing team in Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for the timely and safe delivery of company products while maintaining high standards of professionalism and customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely operate the company's delivery van for product distribution.
	Ensure prompt and accurate delivery of products to customers and company locations.
	Inspect the vehicle before and after each trip and report any faults or maintenance needs.
	Maintain accurate delivery records and obtain proof of delivery where necessary.
	Ensure products are handled carefully to prevent damage during transit.
	Adhere to all traffic laws, company policies, and safety regulations.
	Assist with loading and unloading products when required.
	Keep the delivery vehicle clean and in good working condition.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND in any discipline.
	Valid Nigerian Driver's Licence with a clean driving record.
	Proven experience as a delivery van driver or in a similar driving role.
	Good knowledge of Lagos road network and traffic regulations.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.
	Honest, reliable, and physically fit.


Salary
N90,000 - N100,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 23rd July, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Driver – Lagos" as the subject of the email.

Note: Application is urgent. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

3.) Delivery Van Driver

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Monday – Friday)

Key Responsibilities


	Safely transport and deliver company products to customers.
	Ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Maintain the cleanliness and basic maintenance of the assigned vehicle.
	Keep accurate delivery records and obtain proof of delivery.
	Comply with all traffic laws and company safety policies.


Minimum Qualification


	HND in any discipline.


Requirements:


	Valid driver's licence.
	Proven experience as a delivery van driver.
	Good knowledge of Lagos road network and traffic regulations.
	Ability to drive safely and deliver products promptly.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Honest, responsible, and physically fit.


Salary
N90,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 23rd July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Delivery Van Driver – Lagos" as the subject of the email.
